title: Title of suit to be shown in advertisement of sales under execution
doc_html:
§4349.  Title of suit to be shown in advertisement of sales under execution

In all advertisements of sales of property under execution, the sheriff shall insert the title of the suit in which the writ is issued.
doc_text:
§4349.  Title of suit to be shown in advertisement of sales under execution
In all advertisements of sales of property under execution, the sheriff shall insert the title of the suit in which the writ is issued.
